# Sarilumab 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Sarilumab 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Sarilumab</strong> 目前有 <strong>6 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Sarilumab 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Rheumatoid arthritisKevzara in combination with methotrexate (MTX) is indicated for the treatment of moderately to severely active rheumatoid arthritis (RA) in adult patients who have responded...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>rheumatoid arthritis（99.2%）</li>
<li>colobomatous microphthalmia-rhizomelic dysplasia syndrome（98.5%）</li>
<li>brachydactyly-syndactyly syndrome（98.4%）</li>
<li>bronchitis（74.5%）</li>
<li>indolent plasma cell myeloma（71.7%）</li>
<li>inflammatory bowel disease（68.8%）</li>
<li>anus disease（68.2%）</li>
<li>granulomatous disease, chronic, autosomal recessive, 5（67.7%）</li>
<li>plasma cell myeloma（67.2%）</li>
<li>Crohn disease of the esophagus（66.2%）</li>
<li>functional neutrophil defect（65.7%）</li>
<li>granulomatous disease with defect in neutrophil chemotaxis（63.6%）</li>
<li>cholangiocarcinoma, susceptibility to（60.0%）</li>
<li>acute articular rheumatism（57.7%）</li>
<li>milia, multiple eruptive（56.7%）</li>
<li>erythema nodosum, familial（55.8%）</li>
<li>polydipsia（55.8%）</li>
<li>polymorphic light eruption（55.6%）</li>
<li>reactive arthritis（55.5%）</li>
<li>FADD-related immunodeficiency（55.4%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/sarilumab/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
